title: Glowing Ores
description: Adds emissive textures for ores from various mods and Vanilla.
body:
![Main title card, contains the text "Glowing ores" and "idk what other text to put here"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c51d496f41f61169c4de4578731665d72a5dcec3_0.webp) This resource pack adds glowing/emissive textures for ores from a bunch of different mods. Always adding more, so feel free to request mods you'd like to see supported. **This resource pack does not work without mods, it requires one or more mods that add emmisive texture functionality to be installed in order to function.**
Required mods

Neoforge:

Option 1 (Recommended, 1.21+)

  •  NeoContinuity

Option 2 (1.20.1 - 1.21.1)

  • Continuity
  • Sinytra Connector

Fabric/Quilt:

Option 1 (recommended, 1.18.2+)

  • Continuity

Option 2 (1.16.5-1.21.1)

  • MoreMcmeta
  • MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures

Forge:

Option 1 (recommended, 1.20.1 only)

  • Continuity
  • Sinytra Connector (Fabric mod compatibility for Forge/Neoforge)

Option 2 (1.18.2 or 1.19.2)

  • Connectedness
  • Reforgium
  • Rubidium

Option 3 (1.16.5-1.21.1)

  • MoreMcmeta
  • MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures
Supported mods
  • Ad Astra
  • Alex's Caves
  • Better End
  • Better Nether
  • Blast From the Past
  • Clutter
  • Create
  • Create: Gunsmithing
  • Crystals Overhauled
  • Deeper and Darker
  • Extreme Reactors
  • Galosphere
  • Gemforged
  • Ice and Fire
  • Industrial Revolution
  • Infinite Abyss
  • Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
  • Jaden's Nether Expansion
  • Marium's Soulslike Weaponry
  • Mekanism
  • Mekanism: Ad Astra Ores
  • More Gems
  • Mystical Agriculture
  • Mythic Metals
  • Mythic Upgrades
  • Oh The Biomes You'll Go
  • Pure Ores
  • Randomite Classic
  • Samurai Dynasty
  • Simple Ores
  • Tech Reborn
  • Thermal and Space
  • Thermal series
  • Things
  • Tinkers' Advanced
  • Tinkers' Construct
  • Universal Ores
Troubleshooting

If you are having an issue and none of the below help, please create an issue on the issue tracker.

Minecraft version

Ensure you are using minecraft version 1.20.1 or higher, older minecraft versions might work, but they are not supported.

Resource pack conflicts

This resource pack may not be compatible with other similar glowing ore resource packs, or packs that change textures or models of ore blocks.

Continuity or Sinytra Connector Issue

If adding the aforementioned mods to a modpack and adding this resource pack causes issues such as lag or crashing, see if the same issues happen without this resource pack, if they do then as it is likely a mod compatibility issue, not an issue with this resource pack.

Mod versions

Check all your mods are up to date, especially performance mods like Sodium and it's forks such as Embeddium/Rubidium/Xenon.

Shaders

Some shaderpacks may not be compatible with this resource pack, if it's not working at all or only sometimes, try looking for and turning off settings like "PBR" or "Floodfill" if possible.

I recommend using Complementary Shaders, it's highly configurable and should work with this resource pack.

Feel free to use this resource pack in any modpacks for any launcher, you don't need to ask, redistribution is allowed.
